title: National Dengue Awareness Month
description: A campaign focusing on vector eradication, encouraging citizens to eliminate stagnant water and use barrier protection to reduce Aedes mosquito breeding.

title: Beat Diabetes Initiative
description: Public health screening camp and digital awareness program focusing on early A1C testing and diet guidelines for Type 2 Diabetes prevention.

title: Heart Healthy Cities
description: Community walking initiatives and free blood pressure checkup booths in urban spaces to identify undiagnosed hypertension.
